injuries.comment: The Lightning reported that Kucherov is day-to-day and is unlikely to play on Saturday's (Dec. 6) game against the Islanders, according to Benjamin Pierce of the team's official site.
the Lightning listed Vasilevskiy as OUT for Saturday's (Dec. 6) game against the Oilers.
The Islanders said on Wednesday (Nov. 26) that Pageau is expected to be sidelined for another 2-3 weeks but should return before Christmas.
The Islanders said on Friday (Dec. 5) that Drouin is day-to-day and will travel on the Islanders' two-game road trip to Florida this weekend, per Stefen Rosner of NHL.com.
